---
output:
  pdf_document:
    fig_caption: true
    number_sections: true
    toc: false
lang: lt
bibliography: bibliografija.bib
link-citations: true
csl: "harvard-cite-them-right.csl"
fig_caption: true
extra_dependencies: float
header-includes:
- \renewcommand{\contentsname}{Turinys}
- \usepackage{float}
- \usepackage{booktabs}
- \usepackage{multicol}
- \usepackage{amsthm}
- \floatplacement{figure}{H}
- \newtheorem*{proposition}{Teiginys}
- \newtheorem*{definition}{Apibrėžimas}
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: sentence
---
